description: Edit an existing unified knowledge document by type-prefixed `.md` path. This tool updates full content sections and can also replace specific text inside a section. Knowledge metadata and directory config use dedicated knowledge tools. Returns a plain-text status line.

path.description: Current type-prefixed document path. Document paths must end with `.md`, for example `memory/preferences/editor.md`.

document.description: Document content patch. Provide one or more sections to update.

edits.description: Partial replacements to apply sequentially after any full section fields in this request.

oldString.description: Exact text to find inside the selected section. Use an empty string to replace the whole section.

replaceAll.description: Replace every occurrence in the selected section. Default is false.
